category_sources: source_facts.description says osmcoastline extracts coastline data from OpenStreetMap planet files; official osmcode.org page says it assembles coastline pieces into polygons for map renderers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide osmcoastline; official osmcode.org page title is OSMCoastline.
docs_sources: Official osmcode.org page has a Documentation section linking README and man pages; docs.osmcode.org hosts latest osmcoastline manual pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/osmcode/osmcoastline; per instruction repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official osmcode.org page describe extracting coastline data from OSM planet files and creating polygons for map renderers.
